steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The key signal is the descriptive phrase that follows arranged: “the name of every picture is plainly seen and one has no need of a catalogue.” This tells us the galleries are set up in a particular way—one that achieves visual clarity without needing a guide.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content:
“Organized” directly expresses this setup and structure.
The other choices don't fit: “ranked” means ordered by hierarchy, “scheduled” means timed, and “discussed” means debated—none match how galleries are physically arranged.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
